details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Passion card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
On Evolve - You may summon a Passion follower that costs 3 or less from your hand.

[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [act] Lesson (1): Select another card that costs 1 or less on your field and return it to its owner's hand. For the rest of this turn, this card's [act] abilities except [evolve] can't be activated.

Ward. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower that costs 2 or less on the field and return it to its owner's hand. [act] Lesson (1): Select another card that costs 1 or less on your field and return it to its owner's hand. For the rest of this turn, this card's [act] abilities can't be activated.

When this card leaves the field, if a Magical Item was banished from your EX area this turn, draw a card. [act] [engage], bury this card: Select a follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[fanfare] Search your deck for up to two 1-cost iM@S CG followers and/or 1-cost iM@S CG amulets with different names, summon them, then shuffle your deck.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Passion followers on your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower with 3 defense or less on the field and put it on the bottom of its owner's deck.
Draw a card. If there's a follower that costs 5 or more on your field, recover 1 play point.
[fanfare] Select another iM@S CG follower on your field and give it Rush.
This card costs 3 less to play if there are at least 3 iM@S CG followers on your field. ---------- Ward.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Look at the top card of your deck. You may reveal it and add it to your hand. If you revealed a Cute card, give your leader [defense]+2.
Whenever you play a card, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.
[fanfare][lastwords] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. [act] [cost02], [engage], discard a card: Bury this card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. Ward. [fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+3. Draw 2 cards.

[fanfare] Banish two 1-cost cards from your cemetery: Choose up to 2 of the following. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. (2) Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader. (3) Draw a card. Discard a card. [act] [cost01], Lesson (1): Give this follower Rush.

Ward. [fanfare] If there's a follower with "Uzuki Shimamura" in its name on your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage. [fanfare] If there's a follower with "Mio Honda" in its name on your field, deal 5 damage to each enemy leader.

Storm. Strike - If there's a follower with "Uzuki Shimamura" in its name on your field, give this follower [defense]+1. Strike - If there's a follower with "Rin Shibuya" in its name on your field, give this follower [attack]+1.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Lesson (1): Give your leader [defense]+1.
On Evolve - Search your deck for a follower with "Rin Shibuya" or "Mio Honda" in its name, put it into your EX area, then shuffle your deck. It costs 2 less to play this turn.
[fanfare] If there are 2 iM@S CG followers or less on your field, engage this card. This card doesn't refresh during your start phase. At the start of your main phase, [cost02]: Refresh this card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 iM@S CG followers on your field, give this follower [defense]+2.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it and this follower 3 damage.
Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Cool or Passion card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[fanfare] If there are at least 3 iM@S CG followers on your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
Assail. Bane. Drain.
This card costs 3 less to play if there's a 1-cost follower on your field. ---------- Ward. [fanfare] Refresh each follower on your field.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there are at least 5 Cute cards in your cemetery, deal 3 damage instead.
[quick] Select a follower on your field. Give it [attack]+1/[defense]+3 and your leader [defense]+3.
[act] [engage]: Deal 3 damage to each enemy leader and enemy follower on the field. If there are at least 9 cards with different base costs in your cemetery, deal 7 damage instead.

[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put one of them into your EX area. Bury the rest. [act] [engage], discard a card: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Lesson (2): Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 5 damage and, if there's a Passion follower on your field, draw a card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Select an iM@S CG spell that costs 2 or less in your cemetery and play it for 0 play points.
Once per turn, when you play a card that originally costs 5 or more, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field. Deal it 3 damage and draw a card.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there are at least 3 iM@S CG followers on your field, deal 3 damage instead.
Whenever you play a spell, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Search your deck for a spell that costs 3 or less, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle your deck.
[fanfare] Select another iM@S CG follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

When playing this card, discard a card: This card costs 2 less to play. ---------- [fanfare] Search your deck for up to 2 spells with different names, reveal them, add them to your hand, then shuffle your deck.
[quick] Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and destroy them.
Ward. [fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+3. If you have 10 max play points, deal 3 damage to each enemy leader. Whenever this follower takes at least 5 damage, increase your max play points by 1.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Lesson (1): Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.

[fanfare] Discard up to 3 cards: If you discarded at least 1 Cute card, give your leader [defense]+2. If you discarded at least 1 Cool card, draw a card. If you discarded at least 1 Passion card, deal 2 damage to each enemy leader. [fanfare] If you have 10 max play points, draw 2 cards.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower. [evolve] Lesson (3): Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Increase your max play points by 1.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. If you have 10 max play points, deal 3 damage to its leader.
[fanfare] If there are at least 3 iM@S CG followers on your field, search your deck for a 1-cost spell or 1-cost amulet, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle your deck.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Deal 1 damage to each enemy follower on the field. If you have 10 max play points, deal 4 damage instead.
This card costs 1 more to play for every follower on the field. ---------- Deal 7 damage to each follower on the field.
[fanfare] Deal each enemy leader damage equal to the number of other iM@S CG followers on your field.
[fanfare] If there are at least 3 iM@S CG followers on your field, give this follower [attack]+1 and Rush. Strike - Give your leader [defense]+2.
[fanfare] Choose one of the following. (1) Select an enemy amulet on the field and destroy it. (2) Draw a card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to your max play points.
Draw 3 cards.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. [act] [cost01], Lesson (2): Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and deal them 2 damage.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and deal 3 damage to your leader.

While this card is on your field, your leader and each other follower on your field don't take ability damage during your turn. [act] [cost01], Lesson (1): Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. Activate only once per turn.
[quick] Select an enemy follower that costs 3 or less on the field. Destroy it and bury the top card of your deck.
[fanfare] Deal 2 damage to your leader. Draw 2 cards.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
On Evolve - Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and deal them 5 damage.
Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and, if Sanguine is active for you, deal 2 damage to its leader.
Ward. [lastwords] Select an iM@S CG spell in your cemetery and add it to your hand.
[fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Put one of them on the top of your deck. Bury the rest. While there are at least 5 iM@S CG cards in your cemetery, this follower has Rush.
This card costs 1 less to play if a follower on your field evolved this turn. ---------- [fanfare] If Sanguine is active for you, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. This follower can't attack enemies. At the start of your end phase, give your leader [defense]+1.
At the start of your end phase, deal 1 damage to each enemy leader. [lastwords] Deal 1 damage to each enemy leader.
Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 3 damage and give [attack]+1 to each follower that costs 1 or less on your field.
[evolve] [cost06]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Draw a card.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may reveal an amulet from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
On Evolve - You may summon an amulet that costs 3 or less from your hand.
Rush. Assail. Strike - Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader. [act] [cost02], Lesson (1): Give this follower Storm.
[fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+2. Draw a card. [q][act] [cost02], [engage], bury this card: Select an iM@S CG follower in your cemetery and add it to your hand.
[fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may summon an iM@S CG follower that costs 2 or less from among them. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower. [fanfare] If there's a Risa Matoba on your field, give this follower [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Storm.
On Evolve - Give your leader [defense]+2.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower with 4 defense or less on the field and banish it. [act] [cost05], [engage], bury this card: Select an enemy follower on the field and banish it.
Storm. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of other Passion followers on your field.
[fanfare] Give your leader [defense]+2. If there are at least 5 Passion cards in your cemetery, give [defense]+4 instead.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this follower.
On Evolve - Search your deck for a Cool follower and Passion follower, reveal them, add them to your hand, then shuffle your deck.
Rush. Ward. If this follower would take more than 3 damage, it takes 3 instead.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field. Banish it and, if there's a Cute follower on your field, give your leader [defense]+3.
[fanfare] Lesson (5): Destroy each enemy card on the field.
[fanfare] Put 5 Magical Item tokens into your EX area. Recover 4 play points.
[fanfare] Put 2 Magical Item tokens into your EX area.
[fanfare] Select another iM@S CG follower on your field and give it Bane or Drain.
[act] [engage]: Select another iM@S CG follower on your field and give it [attack]+1.
Give your leader [defense]+1. Draw a card. ---------- (At the start of the game, if your deck is based on the THE IDOLM@STER CINDERELLA GIRLS universe, put 5 Magical Item tokens into your EX area.)
Give your leader [defense]+1. Draw a card. ---------- (At the start of the game, if your deck is based on the THE IDOLM@STER CINDERELLA GIRLS universe, put 5 Magical Item tokens into your EX area.)

Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. [act] [cost01], Lesson (1): Give this follower Storm.

[fanfare] Recover 2 play points. Whenever you play a card during your turn, if it's the 3rd you've played this turn, recover 2 play points. If it's the 5th, give each follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
Ward. On Evolve - Select up to 1 enemy follower on the field and engage or refresh it. During your turn, this follower doesn't take damage.

On Evolve - Select up to 1 card in your EX area and deal damage equal to its cost to your leader. It costs 0 play points to play this turn. [act] [engage], discard a card: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
When playing this card, discard 3 iM@S CG cards: This card costs 6 less to play. ---------- [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 4 damage and draw 2 cards.
On Evolve - Search your deck for a spell that costs 3 or less or amulet that costs 3 or less, put it into your EX area, then shuffle your deck. It costs 3 less to play this turn.

[fanfare] Search your deck for a 3-cost follower and 1-cost follower, summon them, then shuffle your deck. Whenever another iM@S CG follower is put onto your field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

On Evolve - Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may put one of them into your EX area. Bury the rest. [act] [cost01], Lesson (2): Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and deal them 2 damage.
[fanfare] Deal 2 damage to your leader. While your leader's defense is 10 or less, this follower has Storm and Bane.

Ward. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and banish it. At the start of your end phase, if your leader's defense is 5 or less, give it [defense]+5 and draw a card. [act] [cost01], Lesson (1): Give this follower Aura.
On Evolve - Select a follower that costs 8 or less in your cemetery and summon it.
When playing this card, banish 3 Cute cards, 3 Cool cards, and 3 Passion cards from your cemetery: This card costs 9 less to play. ---------- Storm. Bane. Ward.
